Challenge_WindowWasher_desc: Stuck on a window-washer's scaffold outside a skyscraper when the world ended. Get in. Survive. <LINE> Normal: Apocalypse settings, no respawn. Controls in your notebook.
Challenge_WindowWasherHC_desc: Stuck on a window-washer's scaffold outside a skyscraper when the world ended. Get in. Survive. <LINE> Hardcore: 'Extinction' settings — sprinters, scarce loot, respawn. Controls in your notebook.
